_comment: Isolated Slice 0 staging Supabase project. URL and anon/publishable key only — same public-by-design category as the values already hardcoded in assets/supabase.js for production. No service-role key exists for this project anywhere in this repo, per Founder instruction — privileged operations (auth.users deletion, mentor_assignments seeding) are performed manually via the Supabase dashboard, never scripted.
